meta.title: Partner With AWSOverseas | Grow Together
meta.description: Join the AWSOverseas global logistics network. Partner with us as a freight forwarder, customs broker, transport provider, warehouse partner, or business associate.

hero.title: Let's Build a Stronger Global Logistics Network Together
hero.subtitle: Become an AWSOverseas partner and expand your business with international logistics opportunities, reliable support, and long-term collaboration.

benefits.title: Why Partner With AWSOverseas?
benefits.description: We believe in building long-term relationships that create value for both our partners and customers.

items.title: Global Business Network
items.description: Expand your reach through our growing international logistics network.

items.title: Business Growth
items.description: Receive new business opportunities through strategic partnerships.

items.title: Dedicated Support
items.description: Work closely with our experienced logistics team for seamless operations.

items.title: Reliable Collaboration
items.description: Build long-term partnerships based on trust, transparency, and performance.

items.title: Technology Support
items.description: Benefit from our digital tools and shipment management platform.

items.title: Mutual Success
items.description: Grow together by delivering exceptional logistics solutions to customers worldwide.

partnershipTypes.title: Who Can Partner With Us?
partnershipTypes.description: We welcome partnerships from businesses across the logistics and supply chain ecosystem.

items.title: Customs Brokers
items.description: Support import and export customs clearance.

items.title: Transport Companies
items.description: Provide domestic pickup and delivery services.

items.title: Warehouse Providers
items.description: Offer secure storage and distribution facilities.

items.title: Business Referral Partners
items.description: Introduce new customers and earn long-term business opportunities.

steps.title: Submit Your Application
steps.description: Complete the online partnership application form.

steps.title: Application Review
steps.description: Our partnership team reviews your business profile and experience.

steps.title: Business Discussion
steps.description: We'll schedule a meeting to understand collaboration opportunities.

steps.title: Partnership Approval
steps.description: Once approved, you'll become an official AWSOverseas business partner.

applyForm.title: Apply for Partnership
applyForm.description: Fill out the form below and our partnership team will contact you shortly.

fields.label: Tell Us About Your Business
fields.placeholder: Describe your company, experience, and how you'd like to partner with AWSOverseas.

applyForm.successMessage: Thank you! Your partnership application has been submitted successfully. Our team will review it and contact you soon.

items.question: Who can become an AWSOverseas partner?
items.answer: We welcome freight forwarders, customs brokers, transport companies, warehouse providers, shipping agents, and other logistics-related businesses.

items.question: Is there a partnership fee?
items.answer: No. Partnership opportunities are evaluated based on mutual business requirements and collaboration potential.

items.question: How long does the approval process take?
items.answer: Applications are typically reviewed within a few business days. Our team will contact you after the evaluation.

items.question: Can international companies apply?
items.answer: Yes. We welcome partnership applications from businesses around the world.

items.question: How will I know if my application is approved?
items.answer: Our partnership team will contact you by email or phone after reviewing your application.
